## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between SentinelOne and GrowthX Labs for AI-powered content creation and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs offers AI-driven content creation with human editors, combining efficiency and quality](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [SentinelOne faces challenges in scaling content production and improving conversion rates from organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs' approach includes in-depth research, customized workflows, and programmatic content generation](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Potential collaboration could help SentinelOne accelerate content production and improve relevance for revenue growth](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Labs' Content Creation Process

  - [Utilizes AI workflows with human editors for scalable, high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Process includes:](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
      - [Extensive research using multiple sources (e.g., Perplexity API, custom APIs)](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [AI-driven outline creation and content drafting](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
      - [Human editor review and customization](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
      - [Post-processing steps (e.g., style adaptation, cross-linking, SEO optimization, fact-checking)](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Offers both editorial (custom strategy) and programmatic (large-scale templated) content streams](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Pricing: \~$0.10/word for editorial content, with additional services included](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)

### SentinelOne's Current Content Situation

  - [Recently relaunched Cybersecurity 101 section, resulting in 172% traffic increase](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Overall organic traffic growth of 42% YoY in Q4](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [Creating more specific, insightful content beyond general topics](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [Improving conversion rates from organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [Scaling content production efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Currently refreshing existing content manually, which is time-consuming and expensive](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Accelerating content production and refresh cycles](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Developing more targeted, conversion-oriented content](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Exploring new content sections (e.g., CISO-focused content)](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [Leveraging GrowthX Labs' AI workflows to reduce manual effort and costs](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)

### Google and AI-Generated Content

  - [Google doesn't explicitly penalize AI-assisted content](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Focus on uniqueness, value-add, and E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness)](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs' approach emphasizes deep research and unique insights to meet Google's quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX Labs to send a sample SOW (Statement of Work) for review](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs to conduct a more detailed audit of SentinelOne's site](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussion after SentinelOne's RSA conference (week of February 24)](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Explore setting up Slack Connect for easier communication (pending SentinelOne IT approval)](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [SentinelOne to consider internal processes for potential engagement (e.g., procurement timeline)](https://fathom.video/share/TJc7Vzkeft_2rpoHGRX7_UsEXDSya89t?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
